basic_details.job_title: BMC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for MPW, DEO and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Contractual Medical Officer (MBBS), Pharmacist, MPW, DEO, GNM (Staff Nurse), Health Data Manager, Consultant

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 70 years for all posts. Age as on 01 June 2026. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS, MD/MS/DNB in relevant specialty, B.Tech/B.E. IT/Electrical/Electronics/Telecommunication/B.Sc IT/BCA, GNM, D.Pharm/B.Pharm, Graduate any discipline, 10th pass
qualification.details: Contractual Medical Officer (MBBS): MBBS from recognized university, registered with Maharashtra Medical Council, computer knowledge (MS-CIT or equivalent). Contractual Consultant: MD/MS/DNB in relevant specialty (ENT, Pediatrics, General Medicine, Dermatology, Orthopedics, Ophthalmology, Obstetrics & Gynecology), registered with Maharashtra Medical Council. Contractual Health Data Manager: B.Tech/B.E. in IT/Electrical/Electronics/Telecommunication or B.Sc IT/BCA or PG in above fields, experience in IT (image OCR based). Contractual GNM (Staff Nurse): 12th pass, GNM 3 or 3.5 years course, registered with Maharashtra Nursing Council, MS-CIT or equivalent, Marathi subject. Contractual Pharmacist: D.Pharm/B.Pharm from recognized board/university, registered with Maharashtra State Pharmacy Council, MS-CIT or equivalent, Marathi subject. Contractual DEO: Graduate in any discipline, 12th pass with Marathi, MS-CIT, Marathi/English typing 30/40 wpm, data entry speed 8000 KDPH. Contractual MPW: 10th pass with Marathi, MS-CIT.

salary_details.details: Contractual Medical Officer (MBBS): Rs. 90000/- Per Month Contractual Consultant: Rs. 1500/- to Rs. 4000/- Per Visit Contractual Health Data Manager: Rs. 75000/- Per Month Contractual GNM (Staff Nurse): Rs. 30000/- Per Month Contractual Pharmacist: Rs. 20000/- Per Month Contractual DEO: Rs. 18000/- Per Month Contractual MPW: Rs. 18000/- Per Month

selection_process: Online Application Document Verification Merit List
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BMC Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BMC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the BMC Recruitment 2026 is 22 June 2026. Ensure you complete and submit your application before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the maximum age limit for the posts advertised by BMC?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts advertised by BMC is 70 years. This age is to be considered as of 01 June 2026, as per the notification.

faq.question: Q3. Are there any application fees for BMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided information, there are no application fees mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the BMC Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q4. Which posts are available in the BMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The BMC Recruitment 2026 offers several contractual positions including Medical Officer (MBBS), Consultant, Health Data Manager, GNM (Staff Nurse), Pharmacist, DEO, and MPW.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum qualification required for the Contractual MPW post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Contractual MPW post is 10th pass with Marathi language proficiency and MS-CIT certification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for a Contractual Medical Officer (MBBS) at BMC?
faq.answer: The salary for a Contractual Medical Officer (MBBS) at BMC is Rs. 90000/- per month, as indicated in the recruitment details.

faq.question: Q7. How will candidates be selected for the BMC posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the BMC posts involves an online application, followed by document verification, and finally, the preparation of a merit list based on the candidates' qualifications and performance.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application mode for BMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for the BMC Recruitment 2026 is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official website or use the provided application link to submit their forms.

faq.question: Q9. Is computer knowledge mandatory for the Contractual Medical Officer (MBBS) post?
faq.answer: Yes, computer knowledge, specifically MS-CIT or an equivalent certification, is a mandatory requirement for the Contractual Medical Officer (MBBS) post.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for BMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification for BMC Recruitment 2026 can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, where a direct download link is usually provided.
